stdout:
Usage: gaia run render [OPTIONS] [PATH]

 Render presentation outputs from a compiled package.

 `--target docs` renders `docs/detailed-reasoning.md` from the compiled IR
 alone; when `gaia run infer` has also been run, the output is enriched with
 belief and prior values. `--target github` strictly requires inference
 results and emits the `.github-output/` README/wiki/data bundle.
 `--target obsidian` writes `gaia-wiki/` and enriches pages with beliefs
 when fresh inference results are available.
 `--target all` (default) always renders docs and adds github when
 inference results are available, emitting a warning when they are not.

 Compile freshness is required; beliefs freshness is required when
 present. Typical pipeline: ``gaia build compile`` в†’ ``gaia run infer``
 в†’ ``gaia run render``.

 Example:

 .. code-block:: bash

     gaia build compile .
     gaia run infer .
     gaia run render . --target all
     gaia run render . --target obsidian

в•­в”Ђ Arguments в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®

в•°в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•Ї

в”‚ --target        [docs|github|obsidian|all]  What to render: 'docs' (renders  в”‚
в”‚                                             from compiled IR alone; enriched в”‚
в”‚                                             when beliefs are available),     в”‚
в”‚                                             'github' (requires beliefs from  в”‚
в”‚                                             `gaia run infer`), 'obsidian'    в”‚
в”‚                                             (writes gaia-wiki/; beliefs      в”‚
в”‚                                             optional), or 'all' (default;    в”‚
в”‚                                             docs unconditionally + github    в”‚
в”‚                                             when beliefs are available).     в”‚
в”‚                                             [default: all]                   в”‚
